commands: Revise the algorithm to account for potential data skewness by incorporating a data distribution analysis step to determine the optimal chunk size and sorting strategy
Implement a conflict resolution mechanism to handle concurrent update conflicts, such as a transactional logging system or a last-writer-wins approach, to ensure data consistency and integrity

Diversify the search functionality by incorporating additional indexing techniques, such as trie-based indexing or graph-based indexing, to reduce overreliance on hash tables and improve query performance

Integrate data protection regulations into the system design, including data encryption, access controls, and audit logging, to ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards, such as GDPR or HIPAA
Conduct a thorough analysis of the trade-offs between memory usage, search performance, and update throughput to optimize the system for the specific use case and requirements
Consider implementing a caching layer to improve search performance and reduce the load on the underlying storage system
Develop a comprehensive testing strategy to evaluate the system's performance, scalability, and reliability under various workload scenarios and edge cases
